results.sample_name: High Sensitivity - Medical with Small Community
results.original_text: My name is Sarah Chen and I live in Millbrook, a small town in Dutchess County, NY (population ~1,500). I'm 34 years old and was diagnosed with Ehlers-Danlos syndrome hypermobility type last March at the Mayo Clinic. I've been experiencing severe joint dislocations, chronic fatigue, and recently developed POTS. My cardiologist Dr. Williams started me on midodrine and compression therapy. I'm also dealing with anxiety because my employer at the local elementary school doesn't understand why I need so many sick days. Last month I fainted during a school assembly and it was really embarrassing—the whole town is talking about it now.
